assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 26-33: 'Deployment Context Lookup' section explicitly states 'Looking up rhtpa-backend in the Source Repositories table from Security Configuration' and shows the table with Deployment Context column value 'customer-shipped'. The parsed CVE data table (line 23) records 'Deployment context | **customer-shipped**'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 25-35: The 'Deployment Context Lookup' section maps rhtpa-backend to its deployment context and finds 'customer-shipped'. This value is recorded in the Parsed CVE Data table (line 23) as 'Deployment context | **customer-shipped**', making it part of the CVE metadata.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 (lines 51-62): '## Implementation Notes' section contains '### Coordination Guidance' subsection with text 'This component is shipped to customers.' Task 2 (lines 112-118): Same structure with '## Implementation Notes' containing '### Coordination Guidance' with identical customer-shipped guidance text.

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 62, 118, and 159 all contain: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' All three elements (CVE assignment, advisory preparation, formal disclosure) are explicitly mentioned.
